PARAM.description: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.
PARAM.assertion: assert receiverObjectID; // receiver-defining parameter, no assertion needed
PARAM.name: strictChecking
PARAM.content: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.

PARAM.description: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are automatically created when referenced when creating a edge, even if not yet inserted in the graph.
PARAM.assertion: assert receiverObjectID; // receiver-defining parameter, no assertion needed
PARAM.name: autoCreate
PARAM.content: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are automatically created when referenced when creating a edge, even if not yet inserted in the graph.

PARAM.description: Initial capacity of the node storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of nodes of the graph. The graph can grow beyond this limit, but storage reallocation is expensive operation.
PARAM.name: initialNodeCapacity
PARAM.content: Initial capacity of the node storage data structures.

PARAM.description: Initial capacity of the edge storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of edges of the graph. The graph can grow beyond this limit, but storage reallocation is expensive operation.
PARAM.name: initialEdgeCapacity
PARAM.content: Initial capacity of the edge storage data structures.
